query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_xero_services, 
       SUM(monthlyCost) as total_wrong_cost,
       COUNT(DISTINCT customerExternalId) as affected_customers
FROM services 
WHERE dataSource = 'xero' OR supplierName = 'SmileTel';
